python sdk_sampling.py
stdout 'SDK_SAMPLING_OK'

-- sdk_sampling.py --
import os

import httpx
import tinker
from tinker import ServiceClient


client = ServiceClient()
try:
    training = client.create_lora_training_client(
        base_model="Qwen/Qwen3-8B",
        rank=8,
    )
    saved = training.save_weights_for_sampler("sdk-sampling").result(timeout=120)
    sampler = training.create_sampling_client(saved.path)
    sample = sampler.sample(
        tinker.ModelInput.from_ints([1, 1, 1]),
        1,
        tinker.SamplingParams(max_tokens=1, temperature=0),
    ).result(timeout=120)
    assert len(sample.sequences) == 1, sample
    seq = sample.sequences[0]
    assert len(seq.tokens) == 1, sample
    assert len(seq.logprobs) == len(seq.tokens), sample

    with httpx.Client(base_url=os.environ["TINKER_BASE_URL"], timeout=120) as raw:
        req = {
            "model_path": saved.path,
            "num_samples": 1,
            "prompt": {"chunks": [{"type": "encoded_text", "tokens": [1, 1, 1]}]},
            "sampling_params": {
                "max_tokens": 1,
                "temperature": 0,
                "seed": 7,
                "prompt_logprobs": True,
            },
        }
        first = raw.post("/api/v1/asample", json=req)
        first.raise_for_status()
        first = raw.post(
            "/api/v1/retrieve_future",
            json={"future_id": first.json()["request_id"]},
        )
        first.raise_for_status()
        first = first.json()

        second = raw.post("/api/v1/asample", json=req)
        second.raise_for_status()
        second = raw.post(
            "/api/v1/retrieve_future",
            json={"future_id": second.json()["request_id"]},
        )
        second.raise_for_status()
        second = second.json()

    assert first["sequences"][0]["tokens"] == second["sequences"][0]["tokens"], (first, second)
    assert len(first["sequences"][0]["logprobs"]) == len(first["sequences"][0]["tokens"]), first
    assert len(first["prompt_logprobs"]) == 3, first
    assert first["prompt_logprobs"][0] is None, first
    assert all(x is not None for x in first["prompt_logprobs"][1:]), first
    print("SDK_SAMPLING_OK", saved.path)
finally:
    client.holder.close()
